textByHash.20d08c1f3c7140883b1d1001c148fe98ad375bcd: Hello, Zanik! Hello, surface-dweller! Would you like me to lead you to the mines?
textByHash.22486551355bdbb90ba53af91b276abc6ed84b41: Mistag posted me here when surface-dwellers started visiting the mine. If you have business in the Dorgeshuun mines I will guide you through the tunnels.
